title: Tailwind Configuration
content:
# CSS Frameworks Interview Prep

## Q1: Why do static class names like 'text-red-500' compile successfully while dynamic class builders fail?

### Standard Answer
CSS frameworks scan codebase files statically using string parsing regex engines. They do not run the JS code at build time. A string like `bg-${color}-600` is parsed as a literal token, which does not match any output utilities. Consequently, the utility class is excluded from the compilation bundle. Always write complete utility class names inside template files.


## Q2: How does the system handle concurrent throughput anomalies under Tailwind Configuration?

### Standard Answer
The system uses dynamic resource pools and queue-backoff throttles to maintain throughput boundaries, avoiding thread starvation.
